description: Used to diagnose climate responses to the regionally heterogeneous evolution of anthropogenic aerosol emissions. Anthropogenic aerosols and aerosol precursor emissions (BC, OC, NH3, SO2) evolve as in `scen7-h`. All other forcings evolve as in `scen7-vl`. Intended for models without interactive chemistry. Models with interactive chemistry should run `scen7-vl-AQ` instead.
